[textmode.js](../../../../../index.md) / [layering](../../../index.md) / [TextmodeLayer](../../TextmodeLayer.md) / drawFramebuffer

# Accessor: drawFramebuffer

## Get Signature

```ts
get drawFramebuffer(): 
  | TextmodeFramebuffer
  | undefined;
```

Draw framebuffer for this layer.

Returns `undefined` before the layer is initialized.

### Returns

  \| [`TextmodeFramebuffer`](../../../../../classes/TextmodeFramebuffer.md)
  \| `undefined`
